stepText: If you are running low on/out of (redirected) POH tabs collect more soft clay using the gravestone method in the prifddinas mine Gravestone Double Soft Clay (2400/hr). You will have to make soft clay bracelets first. Go to NMZ (optionally as an afk activity) to collect redirection scrolls as necessary. It is recommended to collect a good stack (i.e. 500 tabs and 250 scrolls). Also make Catherby tabs for herb runs.
